_note: Passwords stored as plain text for demo purposes. bcrypt (pip install bcrypt) was evaluated for production use and should be implemented before any real deployment. See SECURITY.md for migration path.

_roles.Viewer: Read-only access. All PII masked at all times. Cannot evaluate, escalate, or clear.
_roles.Analyst: Can run evaluations, view customers, propose clears, and escalate. PII masked by default.
_roles.Manager: Can approve or reject proposed clears. Can unmask PII. Cannot modify audit trail.
_roles.Admin: Full access. Can add users, view all audit trails, update the active ruleset, unmask PII, and export packages.
_roles.Banker: Restricted operations profile. Access limited to Data & Documents only. Customer names are not visible.
